cause_analysis.narrative: About Your Skin .. Brazilian Waxing Specialist churned on 2026-04-21 after 309 days with Zoca. They sent an explicit cancellation request on 2025-12-30 via phone_call — 112 days before churn. Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made. 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [Retention] Cancellation was signalled 112 day(s) before churn via phone_call. Trigger an AM save call within 4 hours of any cancellation keyword — not a support response.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.
[SLA] 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.
[SLA example] On 2026-04-21 via app_chat, client wrote: "Hi Anu, I still haven’t received my refund…" — no outbound response in 30 days.
